current_judgment: compact graph fallback regeneration is now a repo-supported command: the compact artifact can be rebuilt from current chunks and playbook documents without relying on an ad hoc script or reintroducing the oversized full-sidecar request path.
key_evidence: The new artifact-derived builder streams playbook_documents.jsonl and chunks.jsonl, then reconstructs compact books/relations directly instead of reading graph_sidecar.json.
The canonical CLI now exposes this path as `play_book_studio.cli graph-compact`.

Focused regression suite passed: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\test_cli.py tests\test_ingestion_graph_sidecar.py tests\test_ingestion_pipeline.py tests\test_retrieval_graph_runtime.py tests\test_retrieval_runtime_graph_trace.py -q => 35 passed.
Real CLI smoke on April 17, 2026 rewrote artifacts/retrieval/graph_sidecar_compact.json and reported 174 books, 7003 relations, and stable relation-group counts.
next_action: wire `graph-compact` into the operator/runtime maintenance path that refreshes retrieval artifacts so compact fallback regeneration stays one command away from the existing runtime hardening flow.
